mermaid.title: Mermaid to diagram
mermaid.description: Currently only <flowchartLink>Flowchart</flowchartLink>, <sequenceLink>Sequence</sequenceLink>, <classLink>Class</classLink>, and <erdLink>Entity Relationship</erdLink> Diagrams are supported. The other types will be rendered as an image in the editor.

rateLimit.messageLimit: You've hit your AI limit for today. Please come back tomorrow.

brave_measure_text_error.line4: If disabling this setting doesn't fix the display of text elements, please open an <issueLink>issue</issueLink> on GitHub or email <supportLink>support@diagrams.free</supportLink>.

contactUs.title: Contact us
contactUs.intro: Send feedback or questions to diagrams.free support. All fields are required.

toast.success: Thanks — your message was sent. We'll reply to the email you provided.

errors.notConfigured: Contact form is not available. Please email support@diagrams.free.
